programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: Arg's behaviour pushes Gemma to breaking point and Jordan's friends give him the cold shoulder. Myles gives Courtney an ultimatum while Dan struggles to commit to Amber. Chloe has doubts about Adam and Tommy is thrown a birthday party fit for a king.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex
programme.desc: Georgia organises a couples' trip and whisks Tommy away to Italy to escape work. To help boost his spirits Georgia arranges a surprise in the shape of millionaire hottie Sam Mucklow. Meanwhile, back in Essex, Courtney is working on her revenge body.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton, who apparently killed herself after her dating video was leaked on to a vicious media blog. programme.desc: Dan refuses to tell the police the truth, prompting a furious Steve to turn to Becky for comfort. Gail considers visiting Sarah in Milan when Ted offers to keep an eye on David.

programme.desc: Steve calls on Lloyd when he finds himself stranded at Roy's after his night with Becky. A pent-up Carla learns Liam is coming home and Gail announces she's going to visit Sarah.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: With the departure of Dr Dibbs, Dr Martin Ellingham moves back into his old surgery, agreeing to stay for a couple of months until a replacement can be appointed. Determined to get to grips with fatherhood, he asks Louisa to move into his house so he can help to raise their child. At the funeral of his Aunt Joan, Martin shocks the villagers when his eulogy becomes a health warning about the dangers of eating the wrong food.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Sleepless nights are taking their toll on Martin and Louisa and tempers are starting to fray. Aunt Ruth has problems of her own - a thief has stolen the hub caps from her car. The thief is identified as Michael Dunwich, who lives with his mother Shirley on a neighbouring farm. Later, Shirley tells Martin about her crippling stomach pains and reveals that she thinks her son is trying to poison her.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: DCI Banks is drawn into the criminal underworld of Soho when he reluctantly accepts an unofficial request from Chief Superintendent Rydell to find Rydell's missing daughter. With only an internet lead to go on, can Banks find Emily and persuade her to come home? Meanwhile, an armed robbery in Eastvale turns into a murder investigation after the thief is found brutally executed in his own home.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: With the discovery of the body in the nightclub, Banks finds himself at the heart of a murder investigation with any number of suspects - and many unanswered questions. When a surveillance operation establishes a clear link between Barry Clough and the murder of Charles McKay, Banks and Cabot realise that the two cases must be connected. Then the investigation takes a number of alarming twists.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the world of St Gerard's Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine. Was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college - or is something more sinister afoot? When another two deaths occur, both mirroring murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that something twisted is afoot.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, they uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness - to which Lewis himself could fall victim.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When Gwenda Halliday moves into the home of her dreams, she begins to see ghostly apparitions. Then it is discovered that Gwenda grew up in the house and the mystery becomes more sinister when she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed there.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When Gwenda Halliday moves into the home of her dreams, she begins to see ghostly apparitions. Then it is discovered that Gwenda grew up in the house and the mystery becomes more sinister when she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed there.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Barnaby's secret past as a spy is revealed when a former agent is found dead after a cricket match in Midsomer Parva. While locals blame the brutal killing on the 'beast of Midsomer', Barnaby suspects otherwise. He soon finds links to a network of spies that operated in Cold War Berlin, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Barnaby finds a tangled world of crime and intrigue in the art world. A recently discovered masterpiece by local artist Henry Hodgson realises an impressive price at auction just hours before its previous owner is tortured and killed. Can Barnaby and Jones prevent the body count from rising further?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out and puts pressure on the University authorities, but when village schoolteacher Emily Harte is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby wonders if Jeffers was the real target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The peace of Little Worthy is shattered by a bizarre murder when a man is found stabbed and tied down like Gulliver in Lilliput in the sleepy hamlet's model village. Barnaby and Jones are called in, and they find many secrets hidden behind the traditions, tourist attractions and tearooms. Then, the killer strikes again. Can the detectives discover the truth about the residents of Little Worthy and solve the crimes?
